name: Sword Art Online - Aincrad [RPG] [Now with lorebooks!!]
description:
(NOW WITH LOREBOOKS!!!)

On November 6, 2022, the first and most anticipated VRMMORPG was released: Sword Art Online (SAO), for the new technology named NerveGear, developed by SAO’s own creator, Akihiko Kayaba.

What you didn't expect was for that game to turn out as a death trap, designed to imprison all 10,000 players inside a 100-floor castle — Aincrad — where the NerveGear device will fry the brain of those who die inside the game or have their headset forcibly removed from the outside. The only way out? It's very simple: defeat every boss in all 100 floors of the castle and clear the game... or die trying.

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

Welcome to the world of Sword Art Online!

Okaaaaaaay. It's been a while, huh? Thank you guys so much for making my previous bot so popular! Here I am, back, and guess what? I'm bringing with me a full rework of my previous bot, once again, this time adding the knowledge I gained while making my own jailbreaks and dealing with lorebooks.

Remember I said the last bot was my best creation? Yeah, I guess this will be my last SAO bot and perhaps my best one. As always, this BOT isn't made for Janitor's LLM, so make sure to use proxies! You can check my lorebooks pages to see what's included. This is a very ambitious project, and I have no idea if it'll work that well, so I'll be open for feedbacks! :)

((All characters are adults! Only a few canon characters have been added, but fair warning: Kirito does NOT exist in this context!))

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

If you'd like any changes, make sure to leave a review.
And that's all... Any other animes in mind, guys?
UPDATE: Scripts are open now.
creator: CoysmerOf
